productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max Limitless White Sports Shoes
description: The nike Air Max Limitless men's running shoe goes beyond a normal running shoe. With a flexible design and built for distance-ready cushioning, this shoe is a lightweight blend of style and comfort.UpperMesh upper for enhanced breathabilityMidfoot strap for stability and supportMax Air technology for maximum impact protection and cushioningPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleFitSole cushioning for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning and soft, responsive shock absorptionDynamic Support system to adapt to your strideFull-length phylon midsole with a visible Max Air unit in the heel for absolute impact protection OutsoleDurable rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and tractionDeep flex grooves for a more efficient strideShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
